task_description: Comprehensive improvements to the electrician app: enhanced dashboard with billing chart, improved clients with WhatsApp/call buttons, invoice filters and totals, budget duplicate/convert, enhanced communications with wa.me links, weekly calendar agenda, catalog page, and UX improvements (toasts, loading states, confirmations).

verification.summary: npx next build passes cleanly. All 21 pages compile. New /catalogo and /api/catalog/[id] routes build correctly. No test framework in project.
